intent: Write a 3-source guide on 'choosing a first guitar or ukulele plus accessories' for an adult beginner. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the electronics and toys-games categories and collect at least 4 music-relevant products (if full guitars are not stocked, include tuner, stand, strings, capo, or accessories). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/AskReddit AND /f/LifeProTips for posts on adult-beginner instrument choices, practice habits, or regretful purchases. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. (3) Wikipedia — open 'Guitar' or 'Ukulele' articles and extract 3-4 facts about instrument types, tuning, or learning curve. The report must: (a) decide between guitar and ukulele using Wikipedia-grounded reasoning, (b) present the storefront accessories with stats, (c) use community wisdom to adjust priorities, (d) close with a $120 starter kit plus one practice habit. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Hard 3-site. Instrument-beginner angle, encyclopedia grounds instrument-choice logic.
